description: Equip the transit fleet in the Bologna Pasubio scenario with battery devices and deploy a 300 kW charging station at the bus stop designated in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/beb_briefing.txt. The charging station (ID: charger_1) must have an efficiency of 0.95. Configure the bus fleet with a maximum battery capacity of 150,000 and an initial actual capacity of 50,000. After running the simulation, count the number of vehicles that received a charge (energyCharged > 0) and save this count to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/charging_summary.txt. Ensure the simulation generates battery output at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery.xml.
